title: Manufacturing Engineer - Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited in Vadodara is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited:
Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
